basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Recruitment 2026: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research has released the official notification for 1 Project Technician III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Puducherry. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology from a recognized university, PG in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Virology
qualification.details: B. Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology from a recognized university and 3 years of experience in the relevant field OR PG in the department of Microbiology/Biotechnology/Virology.

salary_details.details: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000.00 + HRA 20% per month.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of JIPMER to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JIPMER Project Technician III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III Vacancy Details 2026
JIPMER Project Technician III Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: B. Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology from a recognized university and 3 years of experience in the relevant field OR PG in the department of Microbiology/Biotechnology/Virology.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III Application Fee 2026
JIPMER Project Technician III Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III Salary 2026
content_sections.text: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000.00 + HRA 20% per month.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
JIPMER Project Technician III Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of JIPMER to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Project Technician III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER Project Technician III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the JIPMER Project Technician III position is July 7, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Technician III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology from a recognized university with three years of relevant experience, or a Post Graduate degree in Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Virology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technician III post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technician III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 28,000.00 along with a 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technician III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technician III position in this recruitment drive by JIPMER.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the JIPMER Project Technician III recruitment must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Technician III role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technician III post will involve a written test followed by an interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for JIPMER Project Technician III recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the JIPMER located?
faq.answer: JIPMER is located in Puducherry. The recruitment is for a position within this institute.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract-based position as a Project Technician III at JIPMER.
